title: Add Zephyr/sim cross-implementation validation for malformed drops
description: Update or add tests in lichen/tests/, python/tests/sim/test_*.py, test_cross_impl_interop.py to verify Zephyr/C ingress validation drops the new malformed ICMPv6/UDP cases identically to Python/Rust reference. Check ble_ingress.c validate_ipv6_packet, native paths, fuzz tests. Ensure no crash/leak to upper layers, update metrics if present. Run relevant Twister/native_sim tests.
